sessions.intent: Implement crypto module for hashing (Keccak256, SHA256) and hash verification

before.assumptions: Test stubs and plan already exist from test-designer. Identity module patterns are the reference for handler structure.
before.risk: Low — self-contained module with no dependencies on existing modules

sessions.plan: Implement ICryptoProvider interface, DefaultProvider (keccak256/sha256), HashedData type, hash handler, verify handler. Fill in test stubs. Skip bcrypt tests.

actions.context: Core crypto module: interface, default provider, types, hash and verify action handlers. Provider resolution uses MemoryStack (not DataSource) since providers are runtime objects that can't survive JSON serialization.
Replaced 15 stub tests with real implementations. Added [Skip] to 4 bcrypt tests. All 26 active tests pass.

after.health: All 1675 tests pass (26 crypto + 1649 existing), 4 bcrypt skipped
after.notes: Changed provider resolution from DataSource to MemoryStack — DataSource serializes to JSON which can't round-trip ICryptoProvider objects. PLang tests deferred until module is registered with the builder (piece 8).
